BETTER_EVENT_SAMPLE_EVENT.title: Forgotten Notebook
Between cracked stones, you find a weathered notebook full of route sketches, reward tallies, and one surprisingly practical margin note.
BETTER_EVENT_SAMPLE_EVENT.pages.READ.des: The notes are dry, precise, and annoyingly useful. You pocket a loose stash of coins and leave with a clearer head.
BETTER_EVENT_SAMPLE_EVENT.pages.LEAVE.de: You close the notebook and move on before curiosity becomes commitment.
BETTER_EVENT_HALL_OF_ECHOES.title: Hall of Echoes
BETTER_EVENT_HALL_OF_ECHOES.pages.INITIA: A stone chamber answers each footstep with a different voice. Between the echoes, old bargains keep repeating themselves.
Lose [red]10 HP[/red]. Remove 1 card from your deck.
Locked: no removable card in your deck.
BETTER_EVENT_HALL_OF_ECHOES.pages.EXPLOR: The chamber offers three distinct refrains: one promises wealth, one clarity, and one a safe retreat before the voices learn your name.
Gain [gold]60 Gold[/gold]. Add 1 [gold]Guilty[/gold] to your deck.
BETTER_EVENT_HALL_OF_ECHOES.pages.TREASU: Coins spill from a crack in the wall, warm as if just counted. A softer echo follows you out and settles in your deck as guilt.
BETTER_EVENT_HALL_OF_ECHOES.pages.INSIGH: One voice sharpens into instruction. Your deck leaves the chamber cleaner and keener than before.
BETTER_EVENT_HALL_OF_ECHOES.pages.RETREA: You step back before the chamber can decide what you owe it.
Flame catches on one memory, and the echo collapses with it. The room takes blood for the service.
